description: Install npm dependencies and verify the project compiles cleanly with npx tsc --noEmit before making any changes.
steps: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/movie-for-jaws && npm install' to install all dependencies
Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/movie-for-jaws && npx tsc --noEmit' to verify TypeScript compiles without errors
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit exits with code 0 (no type errors)
findings: npm install added 239 packages successfully. 4 vulnerabilities reported (3 high, 1 critical) but not blocking. npx tsc --noEmit passes cleanly with exit code 0. Node.js v22 used.
